report.summary: Created 3 missing OG images (Sui, On-Chain Analytics, Prediction Markets), fixed mobile filter dropdowns on Sentiment Heatmap, improved tab accessibility on Token Radar, and fixed tooltip viewport overflow

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Sentiment Heatmap: Converted hover-based FilterButton dropdowns to click-based with outside-click-to-close — fixes broken interaction on mobile/touch devices
Sentiment Heatmap: Added aria-expanded, aria-label, and min-height 44px touch targets to all filter buttons for WCAG compliance
Sentiment Heatmap: Fixed TokenTooltip viewport overflow — tooltip now clamps to screen edges instead of rendering off-screen
Sentiment Heatmap: Added pointer-events-none to tooltip to prevent it from blocking hover events on adjacent cells
Token Radar: Added role='tablist' and role='tab' with aria-selected to tab navigation for screen reader accessibility
Token Radar: Added overflow-x-auto and whitespace-nowrap to tabs for mobile horizontal scrolling
Token Radar: Added 44px min-height to tab buttons for mobile touch targets

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: sui-blockchain-guide (1200x630) — SVG + PNG, shows object-centric model with Sui node connected to NFTs/Tokens/DeFi/Gaming
OG image: on-chain-analytics-guide (1200x630) — SVG + PNG, shows line chart visualization with MVRV/SOPR/Exchange Flow metrics
OG image: crypto-prediction-markets-guide-2026 (1200x630) — SVG + PNG, shows YES/NO probability bars for Elections/Sports/Crypto Events
PNG conversions: Generated missing PNGs for data-availability-layer-guide, defi-options-guide-2026, and defai-guide SVGs

sections.title: UX Audit Findings (No Action Needed)
items: Token Radar: Already has good empty state with search icon and helpful message — no changes needed
Token Radar: Search input already has aria-label and all selects have aria-labels — good accessibility baseline
Learn pages (chain-abstraction, stablecoin-yield): Use consistent article layout with breadcrumb, ToC, badges, FAQ — pattern is solid
Sentiment Heatmap: Fear & Greed gauge has proper aria-label with sentiment score and label — good accessibility
